name: Taco Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 frozen deep dish pastry shell (9 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Let frozen pastry shells thaw at room temperature for 10 minutes. Do not prick the shell.
3. In a small bowl, mix mashed avocados, minced garlic, and lemon juice.
4. Stir in chopped tomato, chopped chilies, and hot pepper sauce. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Bake pastry shell for 7 minutes. Remove and set aside.
6. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F.
7. In a skillet, combine ground beef, chopped onion, remaining chilies, and taco seasoning. Cook until the beef is brown and onion is tender. Drain excess fat.
8. Layer shredded Cheddar cheese over the cooked meat mixture in the pastry shell.
9. In a bowl, whisk together beaten eggs, half and half, salt, and pepper.
10. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the ground beef.
11. Bake for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before garnishing with shredded lettuce, corn chips, and chopped tomato.
13. Serves 6.
